sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The bottom-right panel now matches top-right pattern but level didn't complete.
# Let me try matching the bottom-left pattern instead.
# Bottom-left: R b b / R ? R / b b R
# Red positions: (0,0), (1,0), (1,2), (2,2)
# 
# Current bottom-right: b R b / R ? R / b R b
# Need to change: (0,0) b->R, (0,1) R->b, (2,1) R->b, (2,2) b->R

# First reset to all blue, then set the new pattern
# Reset: click current red cells
# Current red: (0,1), (1,0), (1,2), (2,1)
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 48},  # (0,1) R->b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 40},  # (1,0) R->b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 56},  # (1,2) R->b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 48},  # (2,1) R->b
])

# Now set bottom-left pattern: R b b / R ? R / b b R
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 40},  # (0,0) b->R
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 40},  # (1,0) b->R
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 56},  # (1,2) b->R
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 56},  # (2,2) b->R
])

print("Result:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
